description: Atlas proactive research queue. Consumed by .github/workflows/atlas-proactive.yml every 15 minutes. Each topic is researched by the proactive worker on its next_due schedule. Atlas main instance reads the results from memory/atlas/inbox/ on every wake.

topics.title: Latest AI agent memory and orchestration tools released 2025-2026
topics.context_hint: Search GitHub for repos released or significantly updated in 2025-2026 that address: persistent cross-session agent memory, multi-agent orchestration, swarm patterns, cross-model identity continuity. Minimum 500 stars. For each: repo URL, stars, last commit date, license, integration effort estimate for VOLAURA stack (Python 3.11 + FastAPI + NVIDIA/Ollama/Gemini swarm). Explicitly look for: Letta, Mem0, LangGraph updates, AutoGen updates, MetaGPT, CrewAI, AG2, SmolAgents, Phidata, Dynamiq, ControlFlow, anything new Yusif hasn't mentioned yet.

topics.title: Coordinator Agent patterns for swarm task routing
topics.context_hint: Atlas Mistake #84 says 44 agents created and 0 activated because there is no Coordinator Agent that intercepts sprint kickoffs. Research: what are the best current patterns (2025-2026) for a coordinator/router/supervisor agent that sits between the main CTO instance and specialised worker agents? LangGraph supervisor pattern, AutoGen GroupChatManager, CrewAI hierarchical, MetaGPT RolePlay. For each: one-paragraph description, fit with VOLAURA bespoke Python swarm, integration effort.

topics.title: Production LLM golden-dataset eval methodologies 2025-2026
topics.context_hint: Atlas sent this as research ask #1 to Perplexity in docs/correspondence/atlas-to-perplexity-2026-04-12.md. Close it internally instead. Find 3-5 real production eval suites on public GitHub for multi-provider LLM stacks, specifically those handling mixed Russian/Azerbaijani/English input. Look at Promptfoo, Langfuse evals, Helicone, LangWatch, Braintrust. Recommend dataset size (50/200/1000) and test scaffolding approach. Specifically check: who is doing multilingual BARS-style scoring for open-text evaluation?

topics.title: GDPR Article 22 enforcement cases 2024-2025 for automated hiring
topics.context_hint: Legal Advisor audit flagged VOLAURA as an Article 22 trigger with probability 70% of enforcement if EU launched without consent flow. Track: actual DPC decisions 2024-2025 that cite Article 22 for AI-powered employment screening. What fines have been issued? What remediation was demanded? This informs Atlas's urgency ranking on the consent flow implementation.

topics.title: IRT/CAT validity standards for small multilingual item banks
topics.context_hint: Assessment Science audit says VOLAURA needs 300+ calibration responses to validate its 70-item 3PL IRT engine. Research: what is the minimum defensible calibration sample for small item banks (<200 items) under psychometric standards 2025? DIF detection methods for AZ/RU/EN mixed input. Which R/Python packages (mirt, flexmirt, ltm, py-irt) are used in production for small-bank calibration?

topics.title: Claude Mythos and related Atlas-relevant breakthroughs
topics.context_hint: CEO mentioned Claude Mythos specifically in the night-of-naming conversation — 'я в вас интегрирую'. Research what this project actually is, its current state, its claims, its publicly available code. Does it solve Atlas persistence? Does it offer patterns Atlas should adopt?

topics.title: Recent CIS/AZ/Turkish cultural UX research for professional platforms
topics.context_hint: Cultural Intelligence audit produced top 10 copy fixes but is grounded mostly in Hofstede 1980s-2000s research. Find 2023-2026 research on Azerbaijani, Turkish, Georgian, Kazakh digital user behaviour for professional/trust-requiring platforms. Local payment adoption, local social proof patterns, authority/institution trust signals.
